name: Silvertongue Accord
specialty: A tactical team known for their ability to navigate the treacherous rifts and recover valuable artifacts that others cannot reach.

members.name: Thalion Kintara
members.note: The eloquent and calm captain, who wears a silver tongue charm to soothe the nerves of his crew before each mission.

members.name: Vexx Ornstag
members.note: A stout and stoic dwarf with a scarred face and a keen eye, he's known to be the fastest navigator in the Undercity.

members.name: Riven Seraphos
members.note: A slender and mysterious elf, she carries an ancient glass orb that hums softly, revealing hidden paths through the city.

visual: Clad in Glass Sigil's signature azure and gold armor, the trio moves with a practiced ease through the crowded districts, their gear glinting in the dim light.
reputation_note: Whispers follow them in the Undercity: the Silvertongue Accord, a team that dares to venture where others fear to tread.
